name: Rattlesnake and Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Dry kidney or pinto beans
recipeInstructions:
(can substitute quail, dove, chicken, rabbit, or pork)
1. Put the cooked beans into a large pot.
2. Add the tomatoes, jalapenos, onion, salt, garlic, ground beef, and rattlesnake meat (or other).
3. Simmer for 10 minutes to heat thoroughly.
4. For chili pie, place some broken tortilla chips at the bottom of a bowl.
5. Spoon the beans over the chips.
